response.overview: File No. 302/1947 is an experimental short film that unfolds inside a single room where a lone narrator revisits a forgotten government file from 1947. As the contents of the file are read aloud, fragments of history, memory, and human tragedy begin to surface, blurring the line between documentation and lived experience. Through words, silence, and performance, the film explores how personal stories are buried within official records and how the past continues to echo in the present.
response.title: File No 302/1947
